text:
--- Mikhail Teterin <mi+mill@aldan.algebra.com> wrote:

> Can you try setting the NO_WERROR=yes in
> /etc/make.conf or in the environment?
> 
> Thanks!
> 
>  -mi
> 

This allows the port to be built with lang/gcc42,
although not with the patched system gcc 3.4.6 (I'm
not expecting you to support the latter, though -- I
just mention it for your information).
